revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-245

Alternative term: Isolator

A mechanical switching device that provides, in the open position, an isolating distance between the contacts in accordance with specified requirements. It is also capable of carrying currents under normal circuit conditions.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Disconnector}}
